subcodes.first_line: The Ancient Beauty hath established Himself upon the throne of His Most Great Name, and before His countenance the Bird of the Throne warbleth with sweetness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد استقر جمال القدم علی عرش اسمه الاعظم و دیک العرش امام الوجه یتغنی باحسن
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @proclamation to the people of the world, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
